reference: I am seven days past intrauterine insemination, and as of my fourth day, I have noticed a noticeable line in the bikini area. The following day, a few inches from my belly button, there was an indentation. If I look at my abdomen where the uterus is, I have a crescent-like shape on my skin outlining the area. I know it sounds confusing, but can I actually have the start of something in there?
